name: Verify switching from mobile web to native app with UI validation

steps.name: Given User is on the mobile web homepage
📸 User is on the mobile web homepage
Then Search icon should be visible in mobile web
📸 Search icon should be visible in mobile web
When User switches to native shopping app
📸 User switches to native shopping app
Then Search icon should be visible in native app
📸 Search icon should be visible in native app

labels.name: story
labels.value: Verify switching from mobile web to native app with UI validation

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Verify switching from mobile web to native app with UI validation
